zh.lifeSummary: 當Randall Mainwaring於1414年出生在英國英格蘭爾可米哈姆時，他的父親Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet51歲，母親Lady Margery Venables , Baroness45歲。他和Elizabeth Savage至少有4個兒子。他去世於1474年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Randall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

variants.name: Randell
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

variants.name: Randal
meanings: Gaelicized borrowing of Old Norse Rögnvaldr, a compound of regin ‘advice, decision’ (also, ‘the gods’) + valdr ‘ruler’.

variants.name: Randle
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

variants.name: Randel
meanings: Mainly U.S.: medieval vernacular form of   Randolf .  This was in common use as a given name into the 17th century and gave rise to a surname. In modern use the given name is often a transferred use of this surname.

en.lifeSummary: When Randall Mainwaring was born in 1414, in Kermincham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet, was 51 and his mother, Lady Margery Venables , Baroness, was 45. He had at least 4 sons with Elizabeth Savage. He died in 1474, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Randall Mainwaring est né en 1414, à Kermincham, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Lady Margery Venables , Baroness, avait 45 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Elizabeth Savage. Il est décédé en 1474, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Randall Mainwaring 1414 in Kermincham, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet 51 und seine Mutter Lady Margery Venables , Baroness 45. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Savage mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1474 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Randall Mainwaring è nato il nel 1414 nel Kermincham, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margery Venables , Baroness, aveva 45 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Elizabeth Savage. Morì nel 1474, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Randall Mainwaringが1414年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアケルミンチャムで生まれた時，父Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronetは51歳，母Lady Margery Venables , Baronessは45歳であった。彼はElizabeth Savageとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1474年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Randall Mainwaring(이)가 1414년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 커민챔에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margery Venables , Baroness(은)는 45세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Savage(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1474년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Randall Mainwaring nasceu em 1414, em Kermincham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margery Venables , Baroness, tinha 45 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Elizabeth Savage. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Randall Mainwaring родился в 1414 г. в местности кирминчам, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Margery Venables , Baroness, 45. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Elizabeth Savage. Он умер в 1474 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.
